description: MACF agent startup hooks: dependency installer and work check

hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" . && npm install) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"; ln -sfn "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/node_modules" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/node_modules"

printf '%s' '{"continue":true,"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Session started. Please run /macf-status to see your identity and peers, then /macf-issues to check pending work before waiting on user input."}}'
